name: kpi-dashboard
description: Evaluate and improve KPI dashboard slides — cards with metrics, labels, trends, status indicators
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 judge score on KPI card structure: readable labels, 5-layer model, semantic colors, evidence context

prompts.text: Build a 3-card KPI dashboard: Revenue $45M up 12%, Costs $32M on budget, Margin 29% up 3pp
Build a 4-card operations dashboard: Uptime 99.7%, Incidents down 23%, MTTR improved 40%, CSAT 4.6/5
Build a 6-card executive dashboard with traffic light RAG status across finance, customers, operations
Build a 5-card board KPI dashboard showing Revenue, EBITDA, Cash Conversion, ARR Growth, and Net Retention with plan deltas
Build a sales dashboard with 5 KPIs: Pipeline $82M, Win Rate 31%, Avg Deal Size $210K, Sales Cycle 74 days, New Logos 18
Build a customer success dashboard with 4 KPIs: Gross Retention 94%, NPS 72, Escalations down 35%, Time to Value 21 days
Build a supply chain dashboard with 5 KPIs: OTIF 96%, Inventory Turns 8.4x, Forecast Accuracy 87%, Expedite Cost down 18%, Supplier Defects 0.7%
Build a people dashboard with 4 KPIs: Attrition 11%, Time to Hire 18 days, Engagement 81%, Critical Roles Filled 92%
Build a product performance dashboard with 5 KPIs: Monthly Active Users 1.8M, Release Velocity +22%, Sev-1 Bugs 2, Adoption of AI Feature 37%, Crash Rate 0.09%
Build a transformation dashboard with 6 KPIs across savings delivered, milestones hit, automation rate, cycle time, risk status, and adoption
